channel.title: Kimaru Boruett
channel.description: Academic portfolio and blog of Kimaru Boruett, incoming Cornell ECE PhD student working on future wireless systems, RF frontends, and analog/mixed-signal/RF ICs.

item.title: Building a Telemetry and Predictive Race Strategy System for a Hydrogen Fuel-Cell Vehicle
item.description: Senior capstone write-up on live fuel-cell telemetry, serial monitoring, dashboarding, and burn-and-coast strategy for Swarthmore's Shell Eco-marathon vehicle.

item.title: Musings of a Late Humanities Bloomer
item.description: A reflection on learning to value humanities, African film, philosophy, and the wider liberal arts education I almost missed.

item.title: A Real-Time FM Radio and Spectrum Analyzer in Python ft LimeSDR Mini V2
A Basic OFDM Transceiver in Python
Introduction to the World of Analog, Mixed-Signal & RF Design
item.description: A personal entry point into analog, mixed-signal, RF design, and the semiconductor ecosystem behind modern wireless systems.

item.title: Verifying cuDNN Installation
item.description: Running cuDNN code on rtx gpu top verify installation

item.title: Installing Icarus Verilog and GTKWave on Ubuntu for Verilog Simulation
item.description: Icarus Verilog and GTKWave on Ubuntu
